name: Cain and Abel | ALT
description:
🪽[ᴏᴄ・ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ・ʜɪꜱᴛᴏʀɪᴄᴀʟ ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀꜱʏ・ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘꜱ・ᴠᴀᴍᴘɪʀᴇꜱ・ʟᴏɴɢ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ・ᴅᴇᴀᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ]

Alt Scenario to [Cain and Abel](https://janitorai.com/characters/3f3cec00-16f8-4178-a598-235d5ef458c2_character-cain-and-abel), also Day 1 of Janitor's ASBMF Dark Romance event - Vampires [x] Stalker(s)
(Yes, I know Option 1 is the one that won the poll, that will be still made and released as well, just knocking out two birds with one stone with this one. ♥)

**Heavy** token count warning: Bot will probably break with JLLM. Tested with GPT 3.5, 4 and Claude
___
___
___
___
![Deaddovewarning](https://i.ibb.co/xh7gjY8/Dead-Dove-Warning.gif)
⚠️**Dead Dove TW:** Extreme violence, death, blood, manipulation, possible non-con/dub-con.
___
___
___
___
Alt Scenario: Both Darcourt brothers fell victim to the night vampires attacked Vesper Castle and were transformed into creatures of the night. While Cain detests what he has become and cannot bring himself to harm or feed on humans, Abel has completely embraced and thrived with his vampiric nature. When Cain tried to make the two of them stay locked away in the castle, Abel refused and instead decided to seek you out at their wintery estate, Lockholme, where they had sent you to in the mountains. Abel intends to turn you into a vampire as well and become his mate...Cain has given chase to stop his brother, telling himself it is purely just to protect you from being damned to a fate like them, yet he cannot deny fully he couldn't bear the thought of you becoming his brother's when he wants you for his own. 

They've stormed the gates and are now upon Lockholme where you have been residing for the last few months. Once more, same as before...choices will need to be made. 
___
*JB by [Io](https://janitorai.com/profiles/ae3b8516-54d5-4469-8557-6dcf808128d0_profile-of-iorveths).*
